features.name: Core Vite React animal guide
features.description: Mobile-first bilingual Taipei Zoo guide with map, searchable directory, detail panel, dashboard, data table, PWA shell, and static JSON runtime data.
features.evidence: Implemented in src/, public/, scripts/, and README.md. Verified with npm test, npm run build, GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build, npm audit --audit-level=moderate.

features.name: Taipei Open Data pipeline
features.description: Fetch raw API pages into data/raw/zoo-animals and convert them into public/data static JSON with coordinate/media/report handling.
features.evidence: npm run fetch:data fetched 313 records; npm run convert:data generated 313 records with 313 valid coordinates, 312 photo-link records, 3 audio-link records, and 70 video-link records.

features.name: GitHub Pages deployment
features.description: Build and deploy dist/ through GitHub Actions with test, data refresh, conversion, and Pages artifact upload.
features.evidence: .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml added. Vite base switches to /taipei-zoo-guide/ when GITHUB_PAGES=true. Verified with GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build.

features.name: Agent harness
features.description: Maintain AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, init.sh, and session-handoff.md so future agents can restart, verify, and stay in scope.
features.evidence: Harness validation scored 100/100. ./init.sh passed: npm ci, npm run convert:data, npm test, npm run build, GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build, and npm audit --audit-level=moderate.

features.name: Visual browser QA
features.description: Run a successful browser-based smoke test for desktop and mobile layouts after the in-app browser crash is resolved or an alternate approved browser path is available.
features.evidence: Previous in-app browser attempt crashed on local Vite URL; HTTP checks for app shell and data returned 200 OK.

features.name: Code review fixes
features.description: Fix review findings in deployment path handling, generated URL safety, storage robustness, data conversion freshness, and dataset marker parsing.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed after fixes. Additional checks confirmed Pages manifest/icon paths are repository-safe, generated data has 313 records with 313 valid coordinates, and badUrls=0.

features.name: AI slop cleanup
features.description: Reduce cleanup smells without changing behavior: brittle coordinate checks, repeated media counts, repeated row-field lookups, root non-null assertion, and weak API-row regression coverage.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed after cleanup: npm ci, npm run convert:data, npm test, npm run build, GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build, and npm audit --audit-level=moderate.
